title: Foundation Models, Year Two: From On-Device API to General LLM Runtime
description: WWDC26 turned Foundation Models into Swift's general LLM client: a rebuilt on-device model, a server model with no API keys, and the first real agent primitives.

queries.x: ("Foundation Models" OR "Apple Intelligence" OR LanguageModelSession OR "Private Cloud Compute") lang:en
queries.linkedin: Foundation Models wwdc apple intelligence swift ai agents

focus: Apple's Swift Foundation Models framework — the on-device + Private Cloud Compute LLM API for building features in Swift apps (LanguageModelSession, @Generable, tool calling, Dynamic Profiles). The ideal post author is an iOS/Swift developer building with or evaluating this framework.
notSubject: generic machine-learning 'foundation models' or LLMs from other vendors
national or sovereign AI policy and 'build our own foundation models' geopolitics
consumer Apple Intelligence or Siri product news, opinions, or how-tos
Apple stock, business, or partnership commentary
